operationName: Operation Swords of Iron (Israel) / October 7 War
heroSubtitle: All hostages accounted for; ICJ orders Israel to ensure basic needs of Gaza population
footerNote: Data sourced from IDF, Hamas, UN OCHA, UNRWA, WHO, ICJ, ICC, Times of Israel, and Haaretz. Gaza death toll: 72,000+ confirmed killed since Oct 7, 2023 (Gaza Ministry of Health / UN OCHA, Mar 2026). ICC arrest warrants issued for Netanyahu and Gallant (Nov 2024).
